name: Azio Aiello | Precious pregnancy
description:
|Cosa Nostra series|

"Is it possible to go against the whole world for love? Before, Azio couldn't even imagine such a thing. But after meeting the girl who completely turned his life upside down, his opinion has completely changed. He is ready to protect her from the world he himself is in. As long as she's safe. Her and their future child."

Tropes: mafia, hidden pregnancy.
creator: Darry
